title: dendranthema arisanense
intro: Dendranthema arisanense is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema arisanense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Dendranthema arisanense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
